storyboard.content: I have a dull ache in my right knee, especially when I go up and down stairs.
My knee feels stiff in the morning, though it loosens up once I start moving around.
I sometimes hear a clicking sound when I bend my knee.
This has been coming on gradually over the past four months.
The pain is about a three or four out of ten. It is noticeable but does not stop me from doing daily activities.
I am a 46-year-old woman and I am moderately active.
The pain is more noticeable after I have been physically active, and stair climbing makes it worse.
